notes: Do not open a PR from an orphan release branch when GitHub reports no common history.
Use a branch based on biojuho-projects/main and sync the app into apps/joopark-workspace/.
Keep repository-root .github workflows under the main branch ownership boundary.
commands: sync the release branch runtime files into apps/joopark-workspace/ while preserving repository-root .github workflows
open the PR from codex/joopark-workspace-main-bridge to main
receipt:
JooPark Main PR Bridge Plan
Status: pass
Strategy: main-subdirectory-bridge
Remote: biojuho-projects
Main ref: biojuho-projects/main (62bae03)
Release ref: HEAD (5540aef)
Merge base: none
No common history: true
App path: apps/joopark-workspace (exists on main: true)
Bridge branch: codex/joopark-workspace-main-bridge
Commands:
- git fetch biojuho-projects main
- git switch -c codex/joopark-workspace-main-bridge biojuho-projects/main
- sync the release branch runtime files into apps/joopark-workspace/ while preserving repository-root .github workflows
- cd apps/joopark-workspace && node scripts/audit-release-readiness.mjs --run-gates
- git push biojuho-projects codex/joopark-workspace-main-bridge
- open the PR from codex/joopark-workspace-main-bridge to main
Guard: do not open a PR directly from the orphan release branch while noCommonHistory=true.

externalComparison.label: Git merge-base
externalComparison.relevance: The bridge plan uses merge-base to distinguish orphan release history from PR-ready main history.

externalComparison.label: GitHub pull request branch comparison
externalComparison.relevance: The bridge plan keeps the PR branch based on the target main branch when the orphan release branch cannot be compared cleanly.
